content: Curiosity-driven intrinsic reward mechanisms (from Topic A's ICM-based autonomous agents) can be repurposed to solve the 2024-2025 SOTA active learning agent memory bottleneck: reward agents for compressing and retrieving under-utilized older memory traces the same way they are rewarded for exploring novel unknown environments, turning memory maintenance into an intrinsically motivated open-ended process. This creates a self-sustaining memory cycle where the agent proactively curates its own long-term memory without external labeled data for memory pruning or reorganization.
